chatbot.title: CBLUE Assistant
chatbot.greeting: Hello! I'm the CBLUE assistant. How can I help you?

faq.q1: How do I book a fixer?
faq.a1: Go to 'Book Now' in the menu, select Household or Project, fill in your details and submit. We'll match you with a professional fixer within 30 minutes.
faq.a2: We offer Plumbing, Electrical, AC, Interior Design, Landscaping, Roofing, and more for households. For projects: Website Development, AI, Solar Panels, Smart Home, and more.
faq.a3: Starting from just ฿200 processing fee via PromptPay. We have 5 tiers: Economy (฿200), Standard (฿400), Corporate (฿600), Specialist (฿800), Expert (฿1,000).
faq.q4: How do I list a property?
faq.a4: Go to Real Estate > List Your Property. Fill in property details, upload photos, and submit. Your listing will be visible to searchers across Thailand.
faq.q5: How do I search for properties?
faq.a5: Go to Real Estate and use filters for property type, location, price range, and bedrooms to find condos, houses, land, and more.
faq.q6: How do I register as a fixer?
faq.a6: Go to 'Fixer & Pro' in the menu, fill in your details, upload KYC documents and portfolio. Our team will review and approve within 1-3 business days.
faq.a7: We accept PromptPay QR payments. A processing fee of ฿200 (Economy), ฿400 (Standard), ฿600 (Corporate), ฿800 (Specialist), or ฿1,000 (Expert) is required to confirm your booking.
faq.a8: We have 5 tiers: Economy (฿200 fee), Standard (฿400), Corporate (฿600), Specialist (฿800), Expert (฿1,000). All tiers are quality-certified by CBLUE.
faq.q9: How do I find a professional?
faq.a9: Go to Book Fixers & Pros > Book Professionals. Choose from Lawyers, Accountants, Architects, Engineers and more. Fill in your requirements and we'll match you.
faq.a10: A smart home uses IoT devices and automation to control lighting, HVAC, security, and appliances. CBLUE provides smart home installation and integration services.
faq.a11: Solar energy uses photovoltaic panels to convert sunlight into electricity. CBLUE offers solar panel installation, maintenance, and consulting services.
faq.a12: An EV charger is a device that charges electric vehicles. CBLUE provides EV charger installation for homes and commercial buildings.
faq.a13: HVAC stands for Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning. CBLUE provides full HVAC services including installation, repair, and maintenance.
faq.a14: When submitting a Professional Search request, check the subscription consent box. You'll receive an email to set up your subscription account with a password.
faq.a16: Smart farming uses IoT sensors, automated irrigation, and data analytics to optimize crop yields and reduce resource waste. CBLUE provides smart farming solutions.
faq.a17: Our AI engine analyzes your requirements, location, budget and tier preference. It searches our database of verified professionals and ranks them by compatibility, experience, and rating to give you the top 5 matches.
faq.a18: 1) Submit your request, 2) AI matches you with top 5 professionals, 3) Select one and confirm, 4) PO is created, 5) Partner confirms, 6) Pay via PromptPay, 7) Anonymous chat, 8) Schedule meeting, 9) Work completion, 10) Both parties rate.
faq.a19: After confirming a match, a PO is automatically generated with a unique reference number, service details, tier, and processing fee. The PO is shared with the partner for confirmation before you pay.
faq.q20: How does the meeting confirmation work?
faq.a20: After the anonymous chat, you schedule a meeting date and time with the matched professional. Both parties must confirm before the job proceeds. You can add notes or special instructions.
faq.q21: How does the rating system work?
faq.a21: After work completion, both the customer and the service provider rate each other with 1-5 stars and optional comments. This builds trust and helps future matching quality.
faq.q22: What types of property can I search?
faq.a22: You can search for Condominiums, Houses & Villas, Apartments, Land, Commercial Spaces, and Warehouses & Factories across Thailand.
faq.a23: The final service price is negotiated directly between you and the service provider. CBLUE acts only as a matching platform and does not determine or guarantee final pricing. The processing fee is CBLUE's service charge.
faq.q24: What is a variation or addendum?
faq.a24: If additional work is needed beyond the original scope, the service provider can submit a variation request with the reason and additional cost. You can approve or reject it before the work proceeds.
faq.a25: Yes. CBLUE complies with Thailand's PDPA (Personal Data Protection Act). Your data is encrypted, retained only as long as necessary, and never shared without consent. You can request data deletion anytime.
faq.q26: Do I need to log in to book?
faq.a26: Yes, you must be logged in or registered before submitting any booking request. This ensures secure communication and proper tracking of your jobs and payments.
faq.q27: How does the real estate contact flow work?
faq.a27: After searching and selecting a property, you must log in first. Then choose a tier, pay the processing fee via PromptPay QR, and a PO is created with both your details and the lister's. After the lister confirms, you can chat anonymously, schedule a meeting, and rate the experience.
faq.q28: How does AI evaluate fixer registration?
faq.a28: CBLUE AI runs an 8-phase evaluation: KYC document verification, company validation, online credential search, experience analysis, fraud detection, portfolio review, price list evaluation, and tier computation. It scores 7 factors (100 points total) and assigns a tier from Economy to Expert.
faq.a29: Yes. If a fixer adds more portfolio evidence, updates their KYC, gains work experience through CBLUE jobs, or improves their profile, the AI will re-evaluate and may upgrade them to a higher tier automatically.
faq.q30: How are the top 8 matches selected?
faq.a30: AI selects: 2 cheapest in area, 2 highest-rated (stars + satisfaction %), 1 cheapest upper-tier partner, 1 highest-rated upper-tier partner, and 1 returning partner. You can nominate an 8th candidate by entering their partner ID.
